stages.label: REF
stages.description: Verify all Federer/Weinberg references by string match against primary sources

stages.label: WD
stages.description: Well-definedness: T^{αβ} is a distribution of order zero (Radon measure)

stages.label: EQ
stages.description: Equivalence theorem: covariant form ↔ 3+1 form via coarea

stages.label: LOR
stages.description: Lorentz covariance of the distributional T^{αβ}

stages.label: CON
stages.description: Conservation law ∂_β T^{αβ} = 0 via distributional integration by parts

stages.label: GEN
stages.description: General slicing theorem via Federer 4.3 slicing of currents
